data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding tracing assignments back to source records.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to trace assignments back to staffing/fulfillment source records deterministically. However, the evidence provided does not confirm the existence of canonical operational assignment rows with source pointers, which is essential for this validation. The linked use case outlines the need for these elements, but without concrete evidence, the validation remains inconclusive.
gaps: Canonical operational assignment rows with source pointers are not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
